invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3080（基于ATR 22.8537和近期支撑下移）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3080 (based on ATR 22.8537 and lowered recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破0.145（基于ATR 0.0018和近期阻力上移）或融资费率Z-Score降至-30%以下（显示多头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 0.145 (based on ATR 0.0018 and raised recent resistance) or funding rate Z-Score falls below -30% (indicating long pressure easing).
